MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff,Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Abdula Dos.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michael Moore , is present.
Attorney, Grace So , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-26-2010 is vacated.
